title: Booking Holdings Inc. (BKNG) Intrinsic Value — Gemini 3.1 DCF Analysis
description: Intrinsic value analysis of Booking Holdings Inc. using a discounted cash flow (DCF) model and sensitivity analysis.

assumptions.revenueGrowth: 16.0% - Supported by enduring global travel demand and expansion in alternative accommodations.
assumptions.terminalGrowthRate: 3.0% - Reflecting long-term structural growth in global tourism and online booking penetration.
assumptions.discountRate: 9.2% - WACC calculation incorporating a beta of 1.227 and consistent, massive free cash flow generation.
